description_long: This is a towering multi-layer hamburger presented vertically on a round wooden platter, surrounded by a generous serving of golden-brown potato wedges. The hamburger consists of four stacked beef patties, each separated by layers of leafy green lettuce, melted cheese, and slices of tomato. The buns are plain, lightly browned, and appear soft, with no visible sesame seeds. A metal skewer pierces through the center, holding the tall stack together and providing structural support. The overall presentation is rustic and hearty, making it visually striking and appetizing, suitable for display or as a centerpiece in a food-themed urban setting.
description: A tall, multi-layer hamburger with lettuce, cheese, and tomato, stacked on a wooden platter with potato wedges and held together by a metal skewer.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the hamburger stack, with all four patties, toppings, and the skewer clearly visible, surrounded by potato wedges.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the hamburger, showing the layers of lettuce and cheese, and the distribution of potato wedges around the base.
description_view_2: A slightly rotated view reveals the tomato slice at the top and the even stacking of the patties, with the wooden platter and potato wedges in clear view.
description_view_3: The back view emphasizes the leafy lettuce and cheese layers, with the tomato slice more prominent and the skewer still visible at the top.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, cheese, and tomato are layered between each patty, with the lettuce and cheese distributed evenly and a tomato slice near the top. The toppings are visually distinct and separated by the buns and patties.
